title: Burnt X Dynamic Trees compat
description: This addon provides compatibility between Burnt mod and Dynamic Trees to make them work together.
body:
# This project was discontinued because the original author has started working on a similar addon. So download his version instead.


This mod provides a compatibility between [Dynamic Trees](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamictrees) and [Burnt](https://modrinth.com/mod/burnt) mods. Now you can light on fire all the beautiful trees provided by the first mod, and watch the whole forests burn!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/fe7fXjsJ21Q" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
**The addon is still in the development state and there might be some bugs or WIP features.** 


_Note that right now there is no support for soul fire burnt's burning mechanics, and proper fire extinguishing needs work too._

</details>



**You can message me to report bugs in my [Discord]([https://discord.gg/DqDY6Rp4](https://discord.gg/4y4jP4PPwd)) or my [Telegram Channel](https://t.me/lon4th)**(I read telegram much more frequently so if you know how to use it I'd recommend writing me there)



![The modpack is WIP](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/261d7f5f08ae302711bfd735dafc16034c37b898.png)
